ayahArabic: قُمِ ٱلَّيْلَ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Arise [to pray] the night, except for a little -

targetTranslation: a little (describing how much of قُمِ ٱلَّيْلَ)
ayahArabic: قُمِ ٱلَّيْلَ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Arise [to pray] the night, except for a little -

ayahArabic: نِّصْفَهُۥٓ أَوِ ٱنقُصْ مِنْهُ قَلِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Half of it - or subtract from it a little

ayahArabic: نِّصْفَهُۥٓ أَوِ ٱنقُصْ مِنْهُ قَلِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Half of it - or subtract from it a little

ayahArabic: نِّصْفَهُۥٓ أَوِ ٱنقُصْ مِنْهُ قَلِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Half of it - or subtract from it a little

ayahArabic: أَوْ زِدْ عَلَيْهِ وَرَتِّلِ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَرْتِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Or add to it, and recite the Qur’ān with measured recitation.

targetTranslation: careful and beautiful recitation (describing how to recite القُرْءَانَ)
ayahArabic: أَوْ زِدْ عَلَيْهِ وَرَتِّلِ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَرْتِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Or add to it, and recite the Qur’ān with measured recitation.

targetTranslation: a weighty speech (what will be sent down)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا سَنُلْقِى عَلَيْكَ قَوْلًا ثَقِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We will cast upon you a heavy word.

targetTranslation: heavy (describing قَوْلًا - word/speech that is being sent down)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا سَنُلْقِى عَلَيْكَ قَوْلًا ثَقِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We will cast upon you a heavy word.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ ٱلَّيْلِ هِىَ أَشَدُّ وَطْـًٔا وَأَقْوَمُ قِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the hours of the night are more effective for concurrence [of heart and tongue] and more suitable for words.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ ٱلَّيْلِ هِىَ أَشَدُّ وَطْـًٔا وَأَقْوَمُ قِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the hours of the night are more effective for concurrence [of heart and tongue] and more suitable for words.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ ٱلَّيْلِ هِىَ أَشَدُّ وَطْـًٔا وَأَقْوَمُ قِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the hours of the night are more effective for concurrence [of heart and tongue] and more suitable for words.

targetTranslation: in stepping/impact (specifying what is most intense in أَشَدُّ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ ٱلَّيْلِ هِىَ أَشَدُّ وَطْـًٔا وَأَقْوَمُ قِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the hours of the night are more effective for concurrence [of heart and tongue] and more suitable for words.

targetTranslation: a saying (as something being acted upon)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ ٱلَّيْلِ هِىَ أَشَدُّ وَطْـًٔا وَأَقْوَمُ قِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the hours of the night are more effective for concurrence [of heart and tongue] and more suitable for words.

targetTranslation: moving freely/swimming/gliding (object of لَكَ - for you)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ لَكَ فِى ٱلنَّهَارِ سَبْحًا طَوِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, for you by day is prolonged occupation.

targetTranslation: for a long time (describing سَبْحًا/floating free)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ لَكَ فِى ٱلنَّهَارِ سَبْحًا طَوِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, for you by day is prolonged occupation.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلْ إِلَيْهِ تَبْتِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And remember the name of your Lord and devote yourself to Him with [complete] devotion.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلْ إِلَيْهِ تَبْتِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And remember the name of your Lord and devote yourself to Him with [complete] devotion.

ayahArabic: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلْ إِلَيْهِ تَبْتِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And remember the name of your Lord and devote yourself to Him with [complete] devotion.

targetTranslation: The Lord (owner of المشرق والمغرب - the East and West)
ayahArabic: رَّبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَٱتَّخِذْهُ وَكِيلًا
ayahEnglish: [He is] the Lord of the East and the West; there is no deity except Him, so take Him as Disposer of [your] affairs.

ayahArabic: رَّبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَٱتَّخِذْهُ وَكِيلًا
ayahEnglish: [He is] the Lord of the East and the West; there is no deity except Him, so take Him as Disposer of [your] affairs.

targetTranslation: He (referring to Allah mentioned as رَبُّ/Lord)
ayahArabic: رَّبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَٱتَّخِذْهُ وَكِيلًا
ayahEnglish: [He is] the Lord of the East and the West; there is no deity except Him, so take Him as Disposer of [your] affairs.

targetTranslation: as a guardian/trustee (object of فَٱتَّخِذْهُ - take him)
ayahArabic: رَّبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَٱتَّخِذْهُ وَكِيلًا
ayahEnglish: [He is] the Lord of the East and the West; there is no deity except Him, so take Him as Disposer of [your] affairs.

ayahArabic: وَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱهْجُرْهُمْ هَجْرًا جَمِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And be patient over what they say and avoid them with gracious avoidance.

ayahArabic: وَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱهْجُرْهُمْ هَجْرًا جَمِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And be patient over what they say and avoid them with gracious avoidance.

targetTranslation: a graceful abandonment (describing how to abandon them in وَٱهْجُرْهُمْ)
ayahArabic: وَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱهْجُرْهُمْ هَجْرًا جَمِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And be patient over what they say and avoid them with gracious avoidance.

targetTranslation: beautifully (describes how هَجْرًا/departure should be done)
ayahArabic: وَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱهْجُرْهُمْ هَجْرًا جَمِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And be patient over what they say and avoid them with gracious avoidance.

ayahArabic: وَذَرْنِى وَٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ أُو۟لِى ٱلنَّعْمَةِ وَمَهِّلْهُمْ قَلِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And leave Me with [the matter of] the deniers, those of ease [in life], and allow them respite a little.

targetTranslation: a little while (describes وَمَهِّلْهُمْ - give them respite)
ayahArabic: وَذَرْنِى وَٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ أُو۟لِى ٱلنَّعْمَةِ وَمَهِّلْهُمْ قَلِيلًا
ayahEnglish: And leave Me with [the matter of] the deniers, those of ease [in life], and allow them respite a little.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ لَدَيْنَآ أَنكَالًا وَجَحِيمًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, with Us [for them] are shackles and burning fire.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ لَدَيْنَآ أَنكَالًا وَجَحِيمًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, with Us [for them] are shackles and burning fire.

ayahArabic: وَطَعَامًا ذَا غُصَّةٍ وَعَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
ayahEnglish: And food that chokes and a painful punishment -

ayahArabic: وَطَعَامًا ذَا غُصَّةٍ وَعَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
ayahEnglish: And food that chokes and a painful punishment -

ayahArabic: وَطَعَامًا ذَا غُصَّةٍ وَعَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
ayahEnglish: And food that chokes and a painful punishment -

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ تَرْجُفُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ وَكَانَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَثِيبًا مَّهِيلًا
ayahEnglish: On the Day the earth and the mountains will convulse and the mountains will become a heap of sand pouring down.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ تَرْجُفُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ وَكَانَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَثِيبًا مَّهِيلًا
ayahEnglish: On the Day the earth and the mountains will convulse and the mountains will become a heap of sand pouring down.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ تَرْجُفُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ وَكَانَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَثِيبًا مَّهِيلًا
ayahEnglish: On the Day the earth and the mountains will convulse and the mountains will become a heap of sand pouring down.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ تَرْجُفُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ وَكَانَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَثِيبًا مَّهِيلًا
ayahEnglish: On the Day the earth and the mountains will convulse and the mountains will become a heap of sand pouring down.

targetTranslation: we sent forth (connected to إِنَّآ - indeed we)
ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ رَسُولًا شٰهِدًا عَلَيْكُمْ كَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ رَسُولًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We have sent to you a Messenger as a witness upon you just as We sent to Pharaoh a messenger.

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ رَسُولًا شٰهِدًا عَلَيْكُمْ كَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ رَسُولًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We have sent to you a Messenger as a witness upon you just as We sent to Pharaoh a messenger.

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ رَسُولًا شٰهِدًا عَلَيْكُمْ كَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ رَسُولًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We have sent to you a Messenger as a witness upon you just as We sent to Pharaoh a messenger.

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ رَسُولًا شٰهِدًا عَلَيْكُمْ كَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ رَسُولًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We have sent to you a Messenger as a witness upon you just as We sent to Pharaoh a messenger.

targetTranslation: Pharaoh (as the object being sent to)
ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ رَسُولًا شٰهِدًا عَلَيْكُمْ كَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ رَسُولًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We have sent to you a Messenger as a witness upon you just as We sent to Pharaoh a messenger.

targetTranslation: a messenger (object of أَرْسَلْنَآ - we sent)
ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ رَسُولًا شٰهِدًا عَلَيْكُمْ كَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ رَسُولًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We have sent to you a Messenger as a witness upon you just as We sent to Pharaoh a messenger.

targetTranslation: Pharaoh (as the one who disobeyed عَصَىٰ)
ayahArabic: فَعَصَىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ ٱلرَّسُولَ فَأَخَذْنٰهُ أَخْذًا وَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: But Pharaoh disobeyed the messenger, so We seized him with a ruinous seizure.

ayahArabic: فَعَصَىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ ٱلرَّسُولَ فَأَخَذْنٰهُ أَخْذًا وَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: But Pharaoh disobeyed the messenger, so We seized him with a ruinous seizure.

targetTranslation: severely/terribly (describing how Pharaoh was seized in فَأَخَذْنٰهُ)
ayahArabic: فَعَصَىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ ٱلرَّسُولَ فَأَخَذْنٰهُ أَخْذًا وَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: But Pharaoh disobeyed the messenger, so We seized him with a ruinous seizure.

ayahArabic: فَكَيْفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرْتُمْ يَوْمًا يَجْعَلُ ٱلْوِلْدٰنَ شِيبًا
ayahEnglish: Then how can you fear, if you disbelieve, a Day that will make the children white-haired?

ayahArabic: فَكَيْفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرْتُمْ يَوْمًا يَجْعَلُ ٱلْوِلْدٰنَ شِيبًا
ayahEnglish: Then how can you fear, if you disbelieve, a Day that will make the children white-haired?

targetTranslation: a day (object of تَتَّقُونَ - you guard against)
ayahArabic: فَكَيْفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرْتُمْ يَوْمًا يَجْعَلُ ٱلْوِلْدٰنَ شِيبًا
ayahEnglish: Then how can you fear, if you disbelieve, a Day that will make the children white-haired?

targetTranslation: he makes/puts/sets (referring to the Day that makes children gray-haired)
ayahArabic: فَكَيْفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرْتُمْ يَوْمًا يَجْعَلُ ٱلْوِلْدٰنَ شِيبًا
ayahEnglish: Then how can you fear, if you disbelieve, a Day that will make the children white-haired?

targetTranslation: gray-haired (describing what the children will be turned into)
ayahArabic: فَكَيْفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرْتُمْ يَوْمًا يَجْعَلُ ٱلْوِلْدٰنَ شِيبًا
ayahEnglish: Then how can you fear, if you disbelieve, a Day that will make the children white-haired?

ayahArabic: ٱلسَّمَآءُ مُنفَطِرٌۢ بِهِۦ كَانَ وَعْدُهُۥ مَفْعُولًا
ayahEnglish: The heaven will break apart therefrom; ever is His promise fulfilled.

ayahArabic: ٱلسَّمَآءُ مُنفَطِرٌۢ بِهِۦ كَانَ وَعْدُهُۥ مَفْعُولًا
ayahEnglish: The heaven will break apart therefrom; ever is His promise fulfilled.

ayahArabic: ٱلسَّمَآءُ مُنفَطِرٌۢ بِهِۦ كَانَ وَعْدُهُۥ مَفْعُولًا
ayahEnglish: The heaven will break apart therefrom; ever is His promise fulfilled.

ayahArabic: ٱلسَّمَآءُ مُنفَطِرٌۢ بِهِۦ كَانَ وَعْدُهُۥ مَفْعُولًا
ayahEnglish: The heaven will break apart therefrom; ever is His promise fulfilled.

targetTranslation: a reminder (something that reminds) (subject of هٰذِهِۦ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this is a reminder, so whoever wills may take to his Lord a way.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this is a reminder, so whoever wills may take to his Lord a way.

targetTranslation: he took/adopted for himself (subject of شَآءَ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this is a reminder, so whoever wills may take to his Lord a way.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this is a reminder, so whoever wills may take to his Lord a way.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this is a reminder, so whoever wills may take to his Lord a way.

targetTranslation: your Lord (being acted upon by إِنَّ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ تَقُومُ أَدْنَىٰ مِن ثُلُثَىِ ٱلَّيْلِ وَنِصْفَهُۥ وَثُلُثَهُۥ وَطَآئِفَةٌ مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَعَكَ وَٱللَّهُ يُقَدِّرُ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ عَلِمَ أَن لَّن تُحْصُوهُ فَتَابَ عَلَيْكُمْ فَٱقْرَءُوا۟ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنَ ٱلْقُرْءَانِ عَلِمَ أَن سَيَكُونُ مِنكُم مَّرْضَىٰ وَءَاخَرُونَ يَضْرِبُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ يَبْتَغُونَ مِن فَضْلِ ٱللَّهِ وَءَاخَرُونَ يُقٰتِلُونَ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ فَٱقْرَءُوا۟ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنْهُ وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَقْرِضُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا وَمَا تُقَدِّمُوا۟ لِأَنفُسِكُم مِّنْ خَيْرٍ تَجِدُوهُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ هُوَ خَيْرًا وَأَعْظَمَ أَجْرًا وَٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌۢ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, your Lord knows, [O Muḥammad], that you stand [in prayer] almost two thirds of the night or half of it or a third of it, and [so do] a group of those with you. And Allāh determines [the extent of] the night and the day. He has known that you [Muslims] will not be able to do it and has turned to you in forgiveness, so recite what is easy [for you] of the Qur’ān. He has known that there will be among you those who are ill and others traveling throughout the land seeking [something] of the bounty of Allāh and others fighting for the cause of Allāh. So recite what is easy from it and establish prayer and give zakāh and loan Allāh a goodly loan. And whatever good you put forward for yourselves - you will find it with Allāh. It is better and greater in reward. And seek forgiveness of Allāh. Indeed, Allāh is Forgiving and Merciful.

It is better and greater in reward. And seek forgiveness of Allāh. Indeed, Allāh is Forgiving and Merciful.

ayahEnglish: Indeed, your Lord knows, [O Muḥammad], that you stand [in prayer] almost two thirds of the night or half of it or a third of it, and [so do] a group of those with you. And Allāh determines [the extent of] the night and the day. He has known that you [Muslims] will not be able to do it and has turned to you in forgiveness, so recite what is easy [for you] of the Qur’ān. He has known that there will be among you those who are ill and others traveling throughout the land seeking [something] of the bounty of Allāh and others fighting for the cause of Allāh. So recite what is easy from it and establish prayer and give zakāh and loan Allāh a goodly loan. And whatever good you put forward for yourselves - you will find it with Allāh. It is better and greater in reward. And seek forgiveness of Allāh. Indeed, Allāh is Forgiving and Merciful.
